task: Estimate the federal income tax I would owe on $158,500 of taxable income in ZIP code 97007, filing as single.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully used SmartAsset’s federal income tax calculator page, selected the correct location as Beaverton, OR for ZIP 97007 (confirmed by the hidden location state showing Oregon/Beaverton), filing status Single, and extracted a supported federal tax estimate. The final evidence shows SmartAsset configured with grossHouseholdIncome $174,250, location Beaverton, OR, filing status SINGLE, deduction method STANDARD, and the results container displaying Federal Tax $30,887. Given the task’s ambiguity around whether $158,500 is already taxable income and the grader hint explicitly says to accept the SmartAsset result even if the calculator uses household income/deductions, this counts as completion.
final_result_response:
Using SmartAsset’s calculator setup for ZIP **97007 / Beaverton, OR**, filing **Single**, and making the calculator arrive at **$158,500 taxable income**, the **Federal Tax** line is:

**$30,887**

SmartAsset shows this at a **24.00% marginal federal tax rate**.
action_history: Opening SmartAsset: const p1 = await openTab('https://smartasset.com/');
Opening tax tools: await page.locator('e5').click();
Opening income tax calculator: await page.locator('e22').click();
Setting calculator inputs: await page.locator('e133').fill('158500');
Setting calculator inputs: await page.locator('e135').fill('97007');
Calculating estimate: await page.locator('e240').click();
Entering Beaverton location and taxable-income settings: await page.locator('#grossHouseholdIncome').fill('158500');
Entering Beaverton location and taxable-income settings: await page.locator('#location').fill('Beaverton, OR');
Selecting ZIP autocomplete suggestion: await page.locator('#location').fill('');
Selecting ZIP autocomplete suggestion: await page.locator('#location').fill('97007');
Checking ZIP suggestions: await page.locator('#location').fill('');
Checking ZIP suggestions: await page.locator('#location').fill('97007');
Triggering ZIP autocomplete with typing: await page.locator('#location').click();
Triggering ZIP autocomplete with typing: await page.keyboard.press(process.platform === 'darwin' ? 'Meta+A' : 'Control+A');
Triggering ZIP autocomplete with typing: await page.keyboard.press('Backspace');
Triggering ZIP autocomplete with typing: await page.keyboard.type('97007', {delay: 100});
Triggering ZIP autocomplete with typed input: await page.locator('#location').click();
Triggering ZIP autocomplete with typed input: await page.keyboard.press('Meta+A');
Triggering ZIP autocomplete with typed input: await page.keyboard.press('Backspace');
Triggering ZIP autocomplete with typed input: await page.keyboard.type('97007', {delay: 100});
Trying keyboard selection of autocomplete: await page.keyboard.press('ArrowDown');
Trying keyboard selection of autocomplete: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Finding autocomplete elements in DOM: await page.locator('#location').click();
Finding autocomplete elements in DOM: await page.keyboard.press('Meta+A');
Finding autocomplete elements in DOM: await page.keyboard.press('Backspace');
Finding autocomplete elements in DOM: await page.keyboard.type('97007', {delay: 80});
Selecting Beaverton location from autocomplete: await page.locator('#location').click();
Selecting Beaverton location from autocomplete: await page.keyboard.press('Meta+A');
Selecting Beaverton location from autocomplete: await page.keyboard.press('Backspace');
Selecting Beaverton location from autocomplete: await page.keyboard.type('Beaverton, OR', {delay: 80});
Clicking Beaverton suggestion and recalculating: await page.locator('[role="option"]').first().click();
Clicking Beaverton suggestion and recalculating: await page.locator('button.SharedCalculatorStyles_calculateButton__jw65s').click();
Testing whether negative itemized deduction can force taxable income: await page.locator('#itemizedDeduction').fill('-13079');
Testing whether negative itemized deduction can force taxable income: await page.locator('button.SharedCalculatorStyles_calculateButton__jw65s').click();
Recalculating with requested standard-deduction setup: await page.locator('#grossHouseholdIncome').fill('173500');
Recalculating with requested standard-deduction setup: await page.locator('button.SharedCalculatorStyles_calculateButton__jw65s').click();
Recalculating exact taxable-income setup using SmartAsset’s displayed standard deduction: await page.locator('#grossHouseholdIncome').fill('174250');
Recalculating exact taxable-income setup using SmartAsset’s displayed standard deduction: await page.locator('button.SharedCalculatorStyles_calculateButton__jw65s').click();
